中国古代历法把二十八宿按日、月、火、水、木、金、土的次序排列,七日一周,周而复始,称为‘七曜’;西洋历法中也有‘七日为一周’的说法,跟中国的‘七曜’暗合。后来根据国际习惯,把这样连续排列的七天作为工作学习等作息日期的计算单位,叫做星期。
definition_en: week. In the ancient Chinese calendar, the 28 constellations are arranged in the order of the sun(日rì), the moon(月yuè), fire or the Mars(火huǒ), water or the Mercury(水shuǐ), wood or the Jupiter(木mù), metal or the Venus(金jīn) and earth or the Saturn(土tǔ) in a seven-day cycle dubbed ‘seven stars’, which coincides with the ‘seven-day week’ in the Western calendar. Thus the seven-day period becomes a measurement unit for work, study and rest according to the international practice, and it is called ‘week’.

definition_en: lunar calendar; traditional Chinese calendar, according to which a common year has 354 or 355 days, 12 months which may have 30 days or 29 days (the number of days in a month varies from year to year). As the average number of days in a lunar year is 11 days shorter than a solar year, seven leap months are added every 19 years, so a leap year has 383 or 384 days. According to the position of the sun, a solar year is divided into 24 seasonal points to facilitate farming. The years are designated by pairing items from the Heavenly Stems and Earthly Branches respectively so that 60 years form a cycle. The lunar calendar was allegedly created during the Xia Dynasty. Hence the term, xiali, or Xia calendar.

definition_en: intelligence quotient; IQ. According to the equation, IQ = mental age ÷ chronological age × 100, if a child's mental age is equal to his or her chronological age, his or her IQ is 100, which means average intelligence. A person is billed ‘intelligent’ if his IQ is above 120, and ‘of low intelligence’ if his IQ stands below 80. Generally a person's IQ is presumed to be stable, e.g. two five-year-old children with different IQs of 80 and 120 will still maintain the same IQ results a few years later.

definition_cn: 弦乐器,用木料制成,有四根弦,下部为瓜子形的盘,上部为长柄,柄端弯曲。
definition_en: pipa; plucked, four stringed instrument made of wood, with a fingerboard shaped like a melon-seed, and a long bending neck

definition_cn: 昆虫,全身绿色或土黄色,头呈三角形,活动灵便,触角呈丝状,胸部细长,翅两对,前腿呈镰刀状。捕食害虫,对农业有益。有的地区叫刀螂。
definition_en: mantis; mantid; an insect of the family Mantidae; green or yellowish brown predatory insect having a triangular head, thread-like feelers, slender chest, two pairs of wings, and sickle-shaped forelimbs, regarded as a beneficial insect for its preying on pest insects; known in some regions as 刀螂dāolɑng

definition_cn: 爬行动物,形状像龟,甲壳黄褐色,有黑斑,很光润。产在热带和亚热带海中。
definition_en: hawksbill turtle (Eretmochelys imbricata); sea turtle, living in tropical and subtropical seas, with a yellowish-brown, black spotted, smooth, shiny shell that is known as tortoiseshell or mother-of-pearl and used to make ornaments and jewellery

definition_cn: 传说中的百鸟之王,羽毛美丽,雄的叫凤,雌的叫凰。常用来象征祥瑞。
definition_en: phoenix; legendary king of the birds, with beautiful plumage; 凤fèng being the male and 凰huáng the female

definition_cn: (记得、听得、看得)不真切;不清楚
中国传说中指宇宙形成以前模糊一团的景象
definition_en: chaos; primeval state of the universe according to Chinese legend

definition_cn: 形容糊里糊涂、无知无识的样子。
definition_en: muddle-headed and ignorant; dull and confused

definition_cn: 矿物,主要成分是二氧化硅,有各种颜色,多呈层状或环状,质地坚硬耐磨,可用做磨具、仪表轴承等,也可做贵重的装饰品。
definition_en: agate; chalcedony composed mainly of silicon dioxide, with multi-layered or curved bands of different hues, of a hard and wearable texture that makes it an ideal material for grinders and bearings for meters and apparatuses, and precious jewellery

definition_cn: 〈方dial.〉作揖(在早期白话中,‘唱喏’是一面作揖,一面出声致敬)。
definition_en: bow; (in early vernacular) exchange pleasantries while bowing with folded hands held out before one's chest

definition_cn: 鸟,头部圆,上嘴大,呈钩状,下嘴短小,羽毛美丽, 有白、赤、黄、绿等色。生活在热带树林里,吃果实。能模仿人说话的声音。
definition_en: parrot; bird of the family Psittacidae that has a round head, a large hooked upper bill, a short small lower bill, and bright feathers in white, red, yellow or green, living in tropical forests, eating fruits, and being capable of mimicking human voice;

definition_cn: 落叶乔木,叶子近于卵形,有三至五裂片,花白色。果实球形,比山里红略小,深红色,有小斑点,味酸,可以吃,也可入药。
definition_en: Chinese hawthorn (Crataegus pinnatifida); deciduous tree having roughly oval leaves with three to five slivers and white flowers, its fruit deep red, speckled, ball-shaped and slightly smaller than that of the large-fruited Chinese hawthorn (Crataegus pinnatifida var. major), being edible with a sour taste and of medical value
relatives by marriage; husbands of sisters; (in a broad sense) in-laws;

definition_cn: 蛙或蟾蜍的幼体,黑色,椭圆形,像小鱼,有鳃和尾巴。生活在水中,用尾巴运动,逐渐发育生出后肢、前肢,尾巴逐渐变短而消失,最后变成蛙或蟾蜍。
definition_en: tadpole; larva in its aquatic stage, black in colour, oval in shape, looking like a fry with gills and tail, moving about in the water by wagging its tail, and becoming a frog or toad when its tail gradually shortens and disappears and its limbs have appeared and grown
puppet; marionette; wooden figure in puppet show

definition_cn: 〈比喻fig.〉受人操纵的人或组织(多用于政治方面

definition_en: ferocious and rampant; wild and unrestrained; raging

definition_cn: 弦乐器,木制长形。唐宋时有十三根弦,后增至十六根,现发展到二十五根弦。
definition_en: guzheng; long stringed instrument made of wood, with 13 strings in the Tang and Song Dynasties, 16 later, and 25 now;

definition_cn: 一种玩具,在竹篾等做的骨架上糊纸或绢,拉着系在上面的长线,趁着风势可以放上天空。
definition_en: kite; toy consisting of a frame of bamboo strips, etc., covered with paper or silk, flown in the wind at the end of a long string

definition_cn: 多年生草本植物,根茎粗,叶子条形,花蓝紫色。叶子富于韧性,可以用来捆东西,又可以造纸,根可制刷子。
definition_en: Chinese small iris (Iris lactea var. chinensis); perennial herbaceous plant having a thick rootstalk that can be used to make brushes, bluish purple flowers, and strip-shaped leaves resilient enough to be used to bundle things or make paper;

definition_cn: 爬行动物,身体表面有细小鳞片,有四肢,尾巴细长,容易断。雄的背面青绿色,有黑色直纹数条,雌的背面淡褐色,两侧各有黑色直纹一条,腹面都呈淡黄色。生活在草丛中,捕食昆虫和其他小动物。
definition_en: lizard; reptile of the suborder Sauria or Lacertilia, characteristically having an elongated body with tiny scales and a light yellow belly, four legs, and a tapering tail that breaks easily; the male having a bluish green back with black straight stripes, the female having a light brown back with a black straight line on either side, living in weeds, and feeding on insects and tiny animals;

definition_cn: 〈叹词interj.〉做重体力劳动(大多集体操作)时发出的有节奏的声音。
definition_en: heave ho!; yo-heave-ho!; yo-ho!; rhythmic sound uttered while doing heavy physical labour (mostly in a collective operation)

definition_cn: 鸟,像野鸭,体形较小,嘴扁,颈长,趾间有蹼,善游泳,翼长,能飞。雄鸟有彩色羽毛,头后有铜赤、紫、绿等色的长冠毛,嘴红色。雌鸟羽毛苍褐色,嘴灰黑色,雌雄多成对生活在水边。文学上用来比喻夫妻。
definition_en: mandarin duck (Aix galericulata); bird resembling wild duck but smaller, having a flat beak, a long neck, webbed feet, and long wings, able to fly and good at swimming, the male having colourful feathers and a long reddish brown, purple or green aigrette, while the female having dark brown feathers and a dark grey beak, oft. living in couples at waterside. They are compared to husband and wife in literature.

definition_cn: 腔肠动物,身体圆筒形,褐色,口周围有触手,是捕食物的工具,体内有一个空腔。附着在池沼、水沟中的水草或枯叶上。大多雌雄同体,生殖方法有二通常进行无性生殖(由身体长出芽体);夏初和秋末进行有性生殖。
definition_en: hydra (Hydra); hermaphroditic coelenterate that typically has a brown hollow cylindrical body, with a mouth at one end surrounded by tentacles as food catchers, and closed at the other end and attached to water weeds or withered leaves in ponds or marshes, and that reproduces either through parthenogenesis (producing gemma from the body itself) or by sexual reproduction in early summer and late autumn

definition_cn: 牛拉东西时架在脖子上的器具。
definition_en: yoke; tool set on the neck of an ox when pulling things;

definition_cn: 多年生草本植物,茎有刺,叶子羽状,花紫红色,瘦果椭圆形。可入药。
definition_en: Japanese thistle (Cirsium japonicum); herbaceous perennial plant having a stem with thorns, pinnate leaves, purplish red flowers, and oval akenes, and used for medicine;

definition_cn: 云和地面之间发生的一种强烈雷电现象。响声很大,能对人畜、植物、建筑物等造成很大的危害。
definition_en: thunderbolt; thunderclap; heavy discharge of lightning accompanying thunder, oft. causing damage to humans, animals, plants, and buildings;

definition_cn: 有机化合物,化学式C?H?N。无色液体,有臭味。用做溶剂和化学试剂。
definition_en: pyridine; organic chemical compound whose chemical formula is C?H?N; colourless liquid with a strong odour used to make solvent and chemical reagent

definition_cn: 常绿乔木,茎呈圆柱形,没有分枝,叶子大,有长叶柄,掌状深裂,裂片呈披针形,花黄色,雌雄异株,核果长圆形。木材可以制器具。
definition_en: palm; evergreen, dioecious, unbranched tree of the family Palmae, with a cylindrical trunk, large, long-stalked, palmately parted and lanceolate-lobed leaves, yellow flowers, and long, round nuts, its wood used in making implements;

definition_cn: 两栖动物,身体表面有许多疙瘩,内有毒腺,能分泌黏液,吃昆虫、蜗牛等小动物,对农业有益。
definition_en: toad (Bufonidae); frog-like amphibian whose skin is studded with small swellings with venomous glands that can produce a white, sticky mucus, and which feeds on insects and snails and is good for agriculture;

definition_cn: 传说月亮里面有三条腿的蟾蜍,因此,古代诗文里常用来指月亮。
definition_en: Legend has it there is a three-legged toad in the moon, so the toad was oft. used in ancient poetry and prose to refer to the moon.

definition_cn: 鸟,歌鸲(qú)的一种。羽毛褐色,雄的喉部鲜红色,叫的声音很好听。
definition_en: mynah (Luscinia calliope); bird having brown feathers, the male being cardinal red at the throat and having a pleasant chirp;

definition_cn: 〈拟声词onom.〉形容鸭子、大雁等叫的声音。
definition_en: gaggle; quack; quacking sound made by a duck or a goose;
(of a piece of writing) difficult to read or comprehend
(in ancient books) a kind of wild animal
(of mountains, cliffs, etc.) jagged; rugged; craggy; sharp and overlapping

definition_cn: 病人的皮肤、黏膜和眼球的巩膜发黄的症状,由血液中胆红素增高而引起。某些肝炎有这种症状。
definition_en: jaundice; symptom where the patient's skin, the mucosa and sclera of the eyes turn yellow, resulting from the rise of bilirubin in the blood, oft. seen in cases of hepatitis;

definition_cn: 寒冷天,雾凝聚在树木的枝叶上或电线上而成的白色松散冰晶。
definition_en: (soft) rime; white, loose, icy crystals formed by fog on twigs and leaves of trees or power wires in cold days;

definition_cn: 甲壳类动物的一属,形状似龙虾而小,第一对足呈螯状。生活在淡水中,是肺吸虫的中间宿主。
definition_en: crayfish (Cambaroides); small lobster-like freshwater crustacean with a pair of pincers, serving as the intermediate host of the lung fluke
instigate; incite; egg sb. on; abet

definition_cn: 鱼,身体圆柱形,尾端侧扁,鳞小,有黏液,背部黑色,有斑点,腹面白色或灰色。头小而尖,嘴有须5对。常生活在河湖、池沼、水田等处,潜伏泥中。
definition_en: loach (Misgurnus anguillicaudatus); a species of fish having slippery cylindrical body, laterally flat tail, tiny scales, black and flecked back, white or gray belly, pointed small head, and five pairs of feelers on the mouth, inhabiting the mire of rivers, lakes, ponds, paddy fields, etc.

definition_cn: 腔肠动物,身体半球形,青蓝色,半透明,上面有伞状部分,下面有八条口腕,口腕下端有丝状器官。生活在海中,靠伞状部分的伸缩而运动。伞状部分叫海蜇皮,口腕叫海蜇头,可以吃。
definition_en: jellyfish (Rhopilema esculentum); bluish, translucent, semi-circular coelenterate, with an umbrella-like top part, from the underside of which hangs tentacle suckers with filamentous organs attached at the bottom, living in the sea and swimming by alternately opening and shutting the umbrella, which is called the jellyfish tegument, while the tentacles are called jellyfish head, both edible

definition_cn: 昆虫,像蝗虫,常生活在一个地区,不向外地迁移。危害禾本科、豆科等植物,是害虫。
definition_en: grasshopper; pest of the order Orthoptera resembling the locust, usu. living in one area without migration, harmful to grasses, beans, etc.

definition_cn: 熔化金属或其他物质的器皿,一般用黏土、石墨等耐火材料制成。化学实验用的坩埚,用瓷土、铂、镍或其他材料制成。
definition_en: crucible; vessel made of fire-resisting materials (such as porcelain, graphite, etc.) used for melting metal or other substances. Crucible used for chemical experiments is made of porcelain clay, platinum, or nickel.

definition_cn: 多年生草本植物,开白花,果实长椭圆形。根粗大,圆锥形,有香气,中医入药。
definition_en: dahurian angelica (Angelica dahurica); herbaceous perennial with white flowers, prolate elliptical fruits, and cone-shaped, bulky, fragrant roots that are used in traditional Chinese medicine
lonely; solitary; left alone to fend for oneself

definition_cn: 传说中的一种动物,形状像鹿,头上有角,全身有鳞甲,有尾。古人拿它象征祥瑞。
definition_en: kylin; Chinese unicorn; Chinese mythological animal akin to deer, sporting antlers on the head and a tail, covered all over with scales, regarded by ancients as a mascot;

definition_cn: 因刚醒而眼睛模糊不清
definition_en: (of eyes) not yet fully open on waking up
alarmed and panicky; scared; panic-stricken; be seized with terror

definition_cn: 鸟,形状像鹅而体形较大,全身白色,上嘴分黄色和黑色两部分,脚和尾都短,脚黑色,有蹼。生活在海滨或湖边,善飞,吃植物、昆虫等。
definition_en: swan; any of several large-bodied, web-footed goose-like waterfowl of the genus Cygnus, etc., with a long, graceful neck and, typically, pure white feathers, black and short feet with webs, a short tail, and a yellow and black upper bill, living by the sea or lake, feeding on plants, insects, etc., and good at flying;

definition_cn: (女子)文静而美好;(妆饰、仪容)美好。
definition_en: (of a woman) sweet and fair; gentle and graceful; (of adornment, looks) beautiful

definition_cn: 鸟,羽毛黑褐色,天要下雨或刚晴的时候,常在树上咕咕地叫。
definition_en: wood pigeon (Columba palumbus), bird with dark brown feather that oft. coos in the trees before rain or just after it clears;

definition_cn: 有机化合物,化学式C?H?N?。无色晶体,在人体内嘌呤氧化而变成尿酸。
definition_en: purine; organic compound, chemical formula C?H?N?, colourless crystal that oxidizes into uric acid in the human body

definition_cn: 用手轻轻按着并一下一下地移动
definition_en: caress; stroke; smooth sth. out with one's hand
luxuriant growth of trees and grasses; verdant; luxuriantly green

definition_cn: 古哺乳动物,形状和大小都跟现代的象相似,全身有长毛,门齿向上弯曲,生活在寒冷地带,是第四纪的动物,已经绝种。
definition_en: mammoth (Mammuthus primigenius); large, elephantine mammal of the extinct Pleistocene genus Mammuthus, with long fur and curved tusks, living in frigid zones;

definition_cn: 尺蠖蛾的幼虫,行动时身体向上弯成弧状,像用大拇指和中指量距离一样,所以叫尺蠖。
definition_en: looper; inchworm; geometer; geometrid moth worm, which moves with its body arching upward, like a person using thumb and middle finger to measure length

definition_cn: 巾和帼是古代妇女戴的头巾和发饰,借指妇女
definition_en: woman's headdress in ancient times; woman

definition_cn: 落叶灌木,叶子略呈卵形,花黄色,果实黑褐色。可供观赏。
definition_en: kerria (Kerria japonica); deciduous shrub with oval leaf, yellow flower and darkish brown fruit, appreciated for its beauty
aspen-plum; Chinese bush cherry recorded in ancient books;

definition_cn: 鸟,身体黄色,自眼部至头后部黑色,嘴淡红色。叫的声音很好听,吃森林中的害虫,对林业有益。
definition_en: oriole (Oriolidae); songbird with a yellow body, black from eyes to the back of the head, and a pale red mouth, eating pests in forests, beneficial to forestry;

definition_cn: 常绿小乔木或大灌木,有短刺,叶子卵圆形,总状花序,花瓣里面白色,外面淡紫色。果实长圆形,黄色,果皮粗而厚。供观赏,果皮可入药。
definition_en: citron (Citrus medica); small evergreen tree or large shrub with short pricks, ovate leaves, flowers borne in racemes and petals white inside and light purple outside, yellow, round, thick-skinned fruits. Citron is an ornamental tree, and its pericarp is used for medicine.

definition_cn: 病到了无法医治的地步
definition_en: the disease has attacked the vitals — is beyond cure

definition_cn: 昆虫,身体小,黄白色或浅灰色,表面有很多细长的毛。雄的吸食植物的汁。雌的吸人畜的血液,能传播黑热病和白蛉热。
definition_en: sandfly (Phlebotomus); small, yellow-white or pale grey insect with many fine, long hairs on its body, the male sucking plant sap, the female sucking blood from humans and animals, capable of spreading visceral leishmaniasis and sandfly fever;

definition_cn: 多年生草本植物,羽状复叶,小叶长圆形,有毛茸,开淡黄色小花。根可入药。
definition_en: milk vetch (Astragalus membranaceus); herbaceous perennial plant having pinnately compound leaves, long, round and hairy leaflets, small, light yellow flowers, and root used for medicine

definition_cn: 淡水螺的通称,一般较小。
definition_en: general term for freshwater snails, usu. small

definition_cn: 软体动物,长约3厘米,壳卵圆形,淡褐色,边缘紫色。生活在浅海底。
definition_en: clam (Mactra); mollusk, approximately 3 cm. long, having a light brown round shell with purple edges, living at the bottom of shallow sea
popular term for 文蛤 wéngé
tiger called by people in the State of Chu

definition_cn: 一种黄毛夹杂着白点子的马。
definition_en: horse having a yellow coat with white spots

definition_cn: 心里迟疑,要走不走的样子
definition_en: demur; hesitate; be uncertain about whether to move or not

definition_cn: 蚊子的幼虫,是蚊子的卵在水中孵化出来的,体细长,游泳时身体一屈一伸。
definition_en: wiggler; wriggler; larva or pupa of mosquito hatched in water, with a long narrow body that moves by twisting and turning;

definition_cn: 种植和收割。泛指农业劳动
definition_en: sowing and reaping; (in a broad sense) farming; farm work

definition_cn: 植物体受到害虫或真菌的刺激,一部分组织畸形发育而形成的瘤状物。
definition_en: gall; lumps or plant tissue deformation caused by pests or bacteria;
a kind of insect mentioned in ancient literature

definition_cn: 利用轮轴原理制成的一种起重工具,通常安在井上汲水。机械上的绞盘有的也叫辘轳。
definition_en: well-pulley; windlass; winch; tool for lifting water from a well; mechanical winch being also called 辘轳 lù lú

definition_cn: 一年生或二年生草本植物,叶子长圆形,头状花序,花金黄色。茎和叶子是普通蔬菜。莴苣的变种有莴笋、生菜等。
definition_en: lettuce (Lactuca sativa); annual or biennial herbal plant with oblong leaves, golden-yellow flowers in heads. Both the stem and leaves are common vegetables. The varieties include asparagus lettuce and romaine lettuce.

definition_cn: 希望得到(不应该得到的东西)。
definition_en: wish to get (what one should not get); covet

definition_cn: 落叶乔木,高可达二十多米,叶子卵形或长椭圆形,花萼有丝状的毛,结坚果。木材可做铁道枕木。
definition_en: beech; deciduous tree of the genus Fagus, more than 20 metres in maximum height, having oval or elongated oval leaves and calyces covered with filamentous down, bearing hard nuts, and producing timber that can be used as railroad crossties;
(of tree or plant) small of trunk and leaf

definition_cn: 摔跤运动员所穿的一种用多层布制成的上衣。
definition_en: jacket made of several layers of cloth, worn by wrestlers

definition_cn: 一年生草本植物,茎方形,叶子卵圆形,花小,白色。嫩叶可以吃。种子通称苏子,可以榨油。
definition_en: common perilla (Perilla frutescens); herbaceous, annual plant with square stem, oval leaves, which are edible when new, small white flowers, oil-bearing seeds, generally called 苏子 sū zi;

definition_cn: 常绿小乔木或灌木,叶子椭圆形,花小,白色或暗黄色,有特殊的香气,结核果,卵圆形。花供观赏,又可做香料。
definition_en: sweet-scented osmanthus (Osmanthus fragrans); evergreen tree or shrub with oblong leaves, small, white or yellowish flowers, a special sweet scent, ovate drupels, and flowers that are used for ornament or making perfumes and spices;

definition_cn: 指经过烹调的打碎的鸡蛋(多用于菜名、汤名
definition_en: oft. used in dish or soup names
elegant in a casual way; free and easy of manner; unrestrained

definition_cn: 蛭纲动物,中国常见的是宽体蚂蟥,身体略呈纺锤形,扁平而较肥壮,背面通常暗绿色,前吸盘小。生活在水田、湖沼中,能刺伤皮肤,但不吸血。
definition_en: leech (Hirudo medicinalis); common type of hirudinean which in China has a flat and fat spindle-like body with a greenish dark back and a tiny acetabulum, lives in paddy fields, marshes and lakes, can pierce and hurt the skin, but does not suck blood

definition_cn: 落叶乔木,树皮淡灰色,羽状复叶,小叶卵形或卵状披针形,开黄绿色小花,果实黑色。木材坚硬,可以制造枪托,茎可以制黄色染料。树皮可入药。
definition_en: Amur cork tree (Phell-odendron amurense); deciduous tree having light grey bark, pinnately compound oval leaves that are either leaflets or lanceolate, small, yellow and green flowers, and black fruit, its timber useful for making gunstock, its stems for making yellow dyestuff, and its bark for medicine;

definition_cn: 玻璃纸的一种,无色,透明,有光泽,可以染成各种颜色,多用于包装。
definition_en: cellophane; thin, colourless, transparent and shiny cellulose material that can be dyed in different colours and used as wrapping
indulge in; wallow in; be given to; abandon oneself to sth.
epiphysis; end part of a long bone which is at first separated from the main part by cartilage, but later fuses with it by ossification;
mince (walk in a prim manner); walk with a mincing gait; walk with short steps
